name.ja: <ruby>竜<rt>りゅう</rt></ruby><ruby>破<rt>は</rt></ruby><ruby>壊<rt>かい</rt></ruby>の<ruby>導<rt>みちび</rt></ruby>き

requirement.en: During a turn you have not activated "Beacon of Dragon Destroyer".

effect.en: Special Summon 1 Warrior Type monster from your hand to your field in face-up Defense Position. Then, if you have "Buster Blader" face-up on your field, you can draw 2 cards.
